subcodes.first_line: The Book of God speaketh with truth, yet the people remain in a heedlessness the likes of which the eye of creation hath never beheld [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الله ینطق بالحق و لکن القوم فی عفله ما راٴت عین الابداع شبهها قد
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @proclamation to the people of the world, @prophecy and fulfillment, @selfishness; self-love; egotism; self-indulgence
